## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change, no feature or fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `docker compose run --rm test`
- [ ] Linter passes: `docker compose run --rm lint`
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/` if user-facing behavior changed
